<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type local_calendar
  val to_utc : Date.local_calendar -> CalendarLib.Calendar.t
  val to_local : CalendarLib.Calendar.t -> Date.local_calendar
  val now : unit -> Date.local_calendar
  val disable_auto_init : unit -> unit
  val user_tz : unit -> string
  val to_local_time : Date.local_calendar -> CalendarLib.Time.t
  val to_local_date : Date.local_calendar -> CalendarLib.Date.t
  val local_to_calendar : Date.local_calendar -> CalendarLib.Calendar.t
  val local_from_calendar : CalendarLib.Calendar.t -> Date.local_calendar
  val unknown_timezone : unit -> bool
  val smart_time : ?now:Date.local_calendar -> Date.local_calendar -> string
  val smart_date : ?now:Date.local_calendar -> Date.local_calendar -> string
  val smart_hours_minutes : Date.local_calendar -> string
  val smart_interval :
    ?now:Date.local_calendar ->
    Date.local_calendar -> Date.local_calendar -> string
  val smart_date_interval :
    ?now:Date.local_calendar ->
    Date.local_calendar -> Date.local_calendar -> string
end >>
